name: Estelle Heberteaux
subtitle: the last manned keeper at the bayou lighthouse

ultimate_ability.label: The Lens Holds
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Freeze the tension track (LONELINESS / EXPOSURE / BITTERNESS) for two full turns. The lamp does not, in those two turns, ask anything of you.

notes: Estelle's hand for the Hermit arcana. LONELINESS/EXPOSURE/BITTERNESS varies by scenario as the second stat. Scenarios: watch_kept (canonical), the_relief_techs_arrival (easier · BITTERNESS), the_storm_visit (hardest · EXPOSURE).
